title: SDD example rules, schemas, and documentation
description:
Implements decision record (dev/active/f6a704d0-validation-engine.md) section 10.

## Success Criteria

- [hard] Example .jit/rules.toml + schemas demonstrate req:/satisfies: coverage and reference-integrity, with description [hard]/[aspirational] criteria as the canonical source and req:/satisfies: labels derived.
- [hard] A spec content schema validates the requirement/scenario structure and the [hard]/[aspirational] criteria check.
- [hard] Documentation positions the engine as methodology-agnostic with >=1 non-SDD example.
